The Seeker: The Dark is Rising (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,794,452Details
International Box Office $23,058,167
Worldwide Box Office $31,852,619
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,004,070
Total $11,004,070
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,745,315 (42.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,141 opening theaters/3,173 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $15,288,025

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 5th, 2007 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: March 18th, 2008 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for fantasy action and some scary images
Running Time: 99 minutes
Plot point: Coming of Age, Good vs. Evil, Secret Magic
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
